meta.title: Bacillus vulcani sp. nov., a novel thermophilic species isolated from a shallow marine hydrothermal vent
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: A thermophilic spore-forming bacterium was isolated from sediment of a shallow hydrothermal vent at Vulcano Island (Italy). After phenotypic and molecular analyses, it was identified as a novel Bacillus species, for which the name Bacillus vulcani is proposed. The type strain is strain 3s-1(T) (=DSM 13174(T)=CIP 106305(T)).
